codeReview.summary: Implementation adds 3x retry with majority voting for flaky tests. Includes RetryConfig (max_attempts=3, min_passes_for_success=2), RetryAttempt/RetryResult tracking, FlakinessRetryHandler with async retry_test() method, early exit optimization, and exponential backoff support. 17 unit tests cover all functionality. Implementation is correct and complete.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the existing codebase conventions. The existing staged_executor.rs and flakiness.rs modules do not use async_trait::async_trait for traits (despite AGENTS.md suggesting it as a pattern). This is consistent with existing code.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: crates/swell-validation/src/flakiness.rs - existing FlakinessDetector, QuarantinePool, and new FlakinessRetryHandler are all synchronous/inline async without async_trait

summary: The val-flakiness-retry feature implements 3x retry with majority voting (2 out of 3 passes) for flaky test detection. Implementation includes RetryConfig, RetryAttempt, RetryResult structs and FlakinessRetryHandler with async retry_test() method. Early exit optimization stops retries when majority is determined. Integration with FlakinessDetector via should_retry() method. 17 comprehensive unit tests pass. Build and clippy pass with no warnings. Feature fully addresses its expectedBehavior: flaky test detection via history, quarantine pool (pre-existing), and 3x retry with majority voting.
